programme.title: Terri Blackstock's If I Run
programme.desc: Casey Cox goes on the run after being framed for the murder of her best friend. When a private investigator and war veteran digs deeper into the case, he starts to suspect Casey may be innocent, and the real story is far more complex and dangerous.

programme.title: Pride & Prejudice: Atlanta
programme.desc: The author of a self-help book on how to find the perfect husband is determined to find eligible mates for her five single daughters.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Preach, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly when rapper Charlie Jones crosses paths with Kyrus Owens, a charismatic minister. As their romance blossoms, Owens' congregation begins to question his commitment to the church, while Charlie struggles to reconcile her edgy public image.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: His, Hers & Ours
programme.desc: A secret romance starts to blossom between two single parents whose respective teenage children are dating each other. However, when it comes time to tell them the truth, they must decide how much they're willing to risk for family and love.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Forever
programme.desc: A veteran falls head over heels for a local policewoman after returning to his hometown. However, to win her heart, he must also win the approval of her three teenage daughters.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted by Love
programme.desc: Returning home to care for her aunt, a renowned chef gets picked up at the airport by a handsome driver who's 20 years younger than her. They soon make an unexpected yet passionate connection as they share a mutual interest in food, family and fun.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted 2 Love
programme.desc: Accompanied by her new boyfriend, a chef crosses paths with her ex while headlining a prestigious event in Portugal. Their attraction and love for each other soon forces them to decide once again what's best for their careers and relationship.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted by Love
programme.desc: Returning home to care for her aunt, a renowned chef gets picked up at the airport by a handsome driver who's 20 years younger than her. They soon make an unexpected yet passionate connection as they share a mutual interest in food, family and fun.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted 2 Love
programme.desc: Accompanied by her new boyfriend, a chef crosses paths with her ex while headlining a prestigious event in Portugal. Their attraction and love for each other soon forces them to decide once again what's best for their careers and relationship.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Faith Under Fire: The Antoinette Tuff Story
programme.desc: When a deranged gunman storms an elementary school, Antoinette Tuff uses her empathy and faith to convince him to surrender.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fallen Angels Murder Club: Friends to Die For
programme.desc: Ex-convict and aspiring lawyer Hollis Morgan becomes the subject of police scrutiny when a member of her book club is found murdered. Refusing to get stuck with another bad rap, Hollis sets out to find the killer after a second book-inspired murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fallen Angels Murder Club: Heroes and Felons
programme.desc: Members of the Fallen Angels Murder Club search for answers surrounding the mysterious death of one of their own. Hollis soon finds herself at the center of the investigation when a journalist who's reporting on the murder also winds up dead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Toni Braxton: Unbreak My Heart
programme.desc: Rhythm and blues singer-songwriter Toni Braxton (Lex Scott Davis) tackles personal issues related to her battle with lupus, divorce and her son's autism.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Forever
programme.desc: A veteran falls head over heels for a local policewoman after returning to his hometown. However, to win her heart, he must also win the approval of her three teenage daughters.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted by Love
programme.desc: Returning home to care for her aunt, a renowned chef gets picked up at the airport by a handsome driver who's 20 years younger than her. They soon make an unexpected yet passionate connection as they share a mutual interest in food, family and fun.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted 2 Love
programme.desc: Accompanied by her new boyfriend, a chef crosses paths with her ex while headlining a prestigious event in Portugal. Their attraction and love for each other soon forces them to decide once again what's best for their careers and relationship.

programme.title: Toni Braxton's Breathe Again
programme.desc: Rejected as contestants on a reality TV dating show, three women form an unlikely sisterhood that carries them from Los Angeles to Seattle. They soon navigate fresh starts, second chances and the messy realities of dating, friendship and family.

programme.title: Toni Braxton's He Wasn't Man Enough
programme.desc: Mel's world unravels when she discovers her boyfriend, Richard, is now engaged to her estranged college friend, Monica. With help from Mel's loyal best friend, the two women set aside old wounds to show Richard he picked the wrong trio to mess with.

programme.title: Toni Braxton's Breathe Again
programme.desc: Rejected as contestants on a reality TV dating show, three women form an unlikely sisterhood that carries them from Los Angeles to Seattle. They soon navigate fresh starts, second chances and the messy realities of dating, friendship and family.

programme.title: Toni Braxton's He Wasn't Man Enough
programme.desc: Mel's world unravels when she discovers her boyfriend, Richard, is now engaged to her estranged college friend, Monica. With help from Mel's loyal best friend, the two women set aside old wounds to show Richard he picked the wrong trio to mess with.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents: I Will Survive -- The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Rising from humble beginnings and overcoming personal challenges, singer Gloria Gaynor soars to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit "I Will Survive.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Salt-N-Pepa
programme.desc: The journey of Queensborough Community College students Cheryl "Salt" James and Sandra "Pepa" Denton as they enter the world of rap and hip-hop after recording a song for their friend Hurby Azor.

programme.title: Surviving Compton: Dre, Suge & Michel'le
programme.desc: R&B singer Michel'le lives through the turbulent days of N.W.A, being signed to Ruthless Records and becoming romantically involved with Dr. Dre and Suge Knight.

programme.title: Eric Jerome Dickey's Friends and Lovers Part 1
programme.desc: A struggling comedian's love for a doctor deepens, while his loyal best friend finds himself entangled with a free-spirited woman. When tragedy strikes the group, they're forced to rebuild and transform their bond from friendship into chosen family.

programme.title: Eric Jerome Dickey's Friends and Lovers Part 2
programme.desc: A struggling comedian's love for a doctor deepens, while his loyal best friend finds himself entangled with a free-spirited woman. When tragedy strikes the group, they're forced to rebuild and transform their bond from friendship into chosen family.
